decisions.title: Commit to Parquet Exports for Canvas data portability
decisions.context: ENG-8945 signals demand for data export beyond current formats. Parquet is columnar, efficient, and industry-standard for analytics. Aligns with 'Embed Deeper' pillar by enabling customer data pipelines.

arguments.for: Unlocks customer data science workflows, reduces export crashes (ENG-8287), supports Signal>Evidence>Decision by enabling external analysis.
arguments.against: Engineering capacity diverted from core Explore V2 stabilization (25+ bugs in backlog). May delay Canvas GA.

decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 data integrity bugs over new features
decisions.context: SCS-798, SCS-910, ENG-5699, ENG-5848 indicate data discrepancies between V1 and V2. Customer trust in 'Decisions Captured' depends on accurate signal display. 'Nail the Core' pillar at risk.
decisions.blockedBy: ENG-6214 (nondeterministic channel enum behavior) - root cause investigation incomplete

arguments.for: North Star metric meaningless if data is wrong. Customer escalations rising. V2 adoption stalled at 40%.
arguments.against: Feature roadmap (Rule Parameterization ENG-8815, Family Stats ENG-7870) slips 4-6 weeks. Sales pipeline impact.

decisions.title: Ship Rule Parameterization (ENG-8815) in Q1 vs Q2
decisions.context: Python Rules launched in Dec 2025. Parameterization enables reusable rule templates - key to 'Build the Moat' by increasing decision velocity. Canvas adoption depends on it.

arguments.for: Differentiator vs competitors. Sales urgently needs for enterprise deals. 3 customers in pilot program ready to scale.
arguments.against: Explore V2 bugs (see above) create technical debt. Rushed parameterization may inherit data integrity issues.

decisions.title: Deprecate Explore V1 by EOY 2026
decisions.context: Maintaining dual explorers (V1/V2) causes data discrepancies (SCS-798), drains eng capacity, confuses customers. V2 adoption at 40%. 'Nail the Core' requires singular focus.

arguments.for: Frees 30% eng capacity for Canvas/Sift Edge. Eliminates V1/V2 parity bugs. Forces customer migration.
arguments.against: 20% of revenue still on V1-only workflows. Migration support burden. Risk of churn if forced too fast.

decisions.title: Allocate dedicated team to Sift Edge observability
decisions.context: ENG-8887, ENG-8852, ENG-7213 signal need for production monitoring. Edge deployments are 'Embed Deeper' strategic bet but lack operational visibility.

arguments.for: Edge is growing 200% QoQ. Current ad-hoc monitoring unsustainable. Amplitude integration (ENG-7213) enables product usage insights.
arguments.against: Diverts 2 FTEs from customer-facing features. Observability tooling has 6-month ROI lag.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy sync week - 3 escalation calls (SCS-798, SCS-910 data bugs), 2 roadmap alignment sessions, sprint planning. Only 8 free hours for strategy work.
alerts: Thursday 3/6: Back-to-back meetings 9am-5pm, no focus time
5 unscheduled 'quick sync' requests this week - consider office hours
2 recurring meetings (Weekly Eng Sync, Product Review) had <50% attendance - consolidate or cancel?

events.title: ENG-8945 Parquet Exports Technical Review
events.description: Eng/PM review of export architecture. Decision needed on scope (all data types or Canvas-only).

events.title: SCS-798 War Room: V1/V2 Data Discrepancies
events.description: Daily standup until root cause identified. 3 customers reporting missing data in live mode.

events.title: ENG-8815 Rule Parameterization Sprint Kickoff
events.description: Start 3-week sprint. Dependency: ENG-8256 (Create Rule from Family View) must be merged.

events.title: DECISION: V2 Bug Freeze vs Feature Velocity
events.description: VP Eng presents 2-week bug sprint plan. CPO decides if Rule Parameterization slips to Q2.

events.title: ENG-6214 Root Cause Analysis Due
events.description: Channel enum nondeterminism blocking data integrity fixes. Eng to propose solution or workaround.

events.title: DECISION: Parquet Exports Commitment
events.description: Head of Product decides go/no-go for Q1 release. Sales/CS to validate customer demand.

events.title: ENG-8910 sift_py Migration Complete
events.description: Final step before deprecating legacy Python client. Required for Ask SIFT performance improvements.

events.title: DECISION: Explore V1 Deprecation Timeline
events.description: CPO presents EOY 2026 deprecation plan. Board approval needed for customer migration budget.

events.title: Q1 Strategy Review - Pillar Health Check
events.description: Exec team reviews North Star progress, pillar status, decisions from Mar 4-18. Set Q2 priorities.

events.title: DECISION: Sift Edge Observability Team Allocation
events.description: Head of Eng proposes staffing model. Alternatives: dedicated team vs distributed ownership.

events.title: ENG-8815 Rule Parameterization Ship Gate
events.description: Go/no-go for Q1 release. Criteria: 90% test coverage, 3 pilot customers validated, docs complete.

events.title: Q1 North Star Metric Final Read
events.description: Analytics team reports final Decisions Captured Per Customer for Q1. Target: 95 (+9% from today).
